headline: Is It Time To Reassess Xcel Energy (XEL) After Its Recent Share Price Gains
summary: If you are wondering whether Xcel Energy's current share price still offers value, it helps to start with how the stock has actually been behaving in recent months. The share price recently closed at US$81.08, with a 1.6% decline over the last 7 days, a 1.3% gain over 30 days, and returns of 8.6% year to date and 19.3% over the last year, alongside 27.6% over 3 years and 33.7% over 5 years. Recent price moves sit against a backdrop of ongoing attention on Xcel Energy as a regulated electric...
